calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2026 Continued To Aug-19-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-29-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff American Exparess National Bank appearing represented by Jonathan Vaknin, Esq. via zoom.
Defendants Lixia Li and Hermes Partners Inc. not appearing.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the documents filed, consideration and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff American Express National Bank, and against Defendants Lixia Li and Hermes Partners Inc., as follows:

Damages: $378,918.94
Prejudgment Interest: $0
Attorney Fees: $0
Costs: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $378,918.94

No proposed judgment was submitted on this matter. Mr. Vaknin was instructed to prepare and email a proposed judgment to this department for review and signature.

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-06-2026 Continued To May-29-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff American Express National Bank appearing represented by Jonathan Vaknin, Esq. via zoom.
Defendant Lixia Li not appearing.

This department has not received any courtesy copies of the relevant documents.

This matter is continued to May 29, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow Plaintiff an oppertunity to provide this department with courtesty copies.
